overall.description: A slow panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk city skyline at night, viewed from a boat moving across a body of water. The scene features illuminated high-rise buildings shrouded in atmospheric fog, with neon green lighting and light reflections dancing on the water surface. The footage appears to be from a video game with high-fidelity graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk waterfront cityscape viewed from moving vessel

agents.ego_description: moving slowly along the water's edge on a boat, observing the illuminated city skyline through the fog

entered.detail: large building with illuminated green 'softsys' signage on the facade, visible through the fog
cluster of tall futuristic skyscrapers with scattered illuminated windows rising above the fog layer
dark water with bright white light reflections creating horizontal streaks across the foreground
thick greenish haze obscuring the lower portions of buildings and creating depth layers
faint illuminated structures fading into the distance on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: A continuous slow tracking shot along a foggy waterfront at night, showcasing a cyberpunk city skyline. The camera moves steadily past the water's surface, capturing bright reflections and the silhouettes of illuminated glass towers. The 'softsys' building remains visible on the right throughout, while atmospheric fog creates a moody, layered depth across the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy waterfront that steadily reveals the scale of a neon-lit cyberpunk skyline. It begins with a slow tracking motion across the dark water, capturing shimmering reflections that dance beneath the silhouettes of illuminated glass towers. As the camera glides forward, the atmospheric fog creates a moody, layered depth that partially obscures the urban expanse. The scene then maintains a steady focus on the softsys building to the right, which serves as a constant anchor while the rest of the futuristic cityscape unfolds in the distance.
